title: UKCISA:持BNO visa入讀大學暫不符合home fee status或student finance資格

replies.msg:
UKCISA:持BNO visa入讀大學暫不符合home fee status或student finance資格，已要求當局重新考慮
https://www.ukcisa.org.uk/studentnews/1647/Hong-Kong-BNO-visa-and-study?q=Home+fee&ExactMatch=True

Those granted limited permission under this route are not currently eligible for home fee status or student finance as a separate category in the fees and student support regulations. We have asked that this be reconsidered.

However, settlement is available after five years in this route, or after five years in a mixture of routes leading to settlement. Routes leading to settlement do not include Student, Child Student, Start-up, Youth Mobility, or the Graduate route once introduced. Most other work routes lead to settlement.

Once granted settlement, a student potentially becomes eligible for home fee status and student finance. In most cases, the student must have had settled status on the relevant day or the first day of the first academic year of the course so cannot become eligible if they have already started their course.
